official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound set_subtitle_text body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_subtitle_text to packet id 0x70.
The official set_subtitle_text body is one trusted Component.
The generated fixture uses Component.literal("rustmine subtitle") only.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded text value, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove rich Component forms, title UI behavior, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer rich Component, title UI behavior, or client-load completion.
